violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025

The door #5 and #4 to the outside, located in the gym, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
The gasket for milk chest #2 is in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
The floor/coving under the dishwashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

The floor by door #5 has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the gym (door #5), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The gaskets for milk chest #1 and #3 were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The floor under the dishwasher was observed in poor repair. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (hallway before entering the cafeteria), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
The condensate from the (milk case) was observed with excess ice build up. Corrective active: establishment is to run a defrost cycle on the unit. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the establishment, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the gymnasium, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2023
The floor under the dishwashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
The floor under the dishwasher and at the entry of the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
